name: Meatballs in Chile Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the corn tortillas into pieces.
2. Place the tortilla pieces and milk in a large bowl; let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients (except basic red sauce and beef broth) to form meatballs about 1-inch in diameter.
4. Heat the basic red sauce and beef broth in a 10-inch skillet until boiling.
5. Reduce heat and add the meatballs.
6. Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the meatballs are cooked through.
